headline: S&P 500 Halts Gains As Oil Jumps 8% On Iran Ceasefire Standoff: Stock Market Today
summary: Crude oil surged nearly 8% – its best day since April 2 – after US strikes on Iran and Tehran's retaliation, stalling the S&P 500's rally even as software stocks soared.

headline: 2 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks with Solid Fundamentals and 1 That Underwhelm
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%.
